examples: She will close the eyes comfortably, cozily.
People usually wear short pants and sandals, and cozily lounge on cane chairs.
The sky had gone dark, and cozily lighted storefronts beckoned like fireflies.
Santo Tomas, Peru ( VICE) -- The town of Santo Tomas is 12, 000 feet above sea level, nestled cozily in the vertiginous Peruvian Andes.
